case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NUBIA DE CAMPOS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE CAMPOS, NUBIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT DE CAMPOS, NUBIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-27-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE CAMPOS, NUBIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT NUBIA DE CAMPOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.
